prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high caloric intake with carbohydrate loading for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Macronutrient composition emphasizes carbohydrates (55-65% of calories) appropriate for endurance athlete
Total daily caloric intake aligns with marathon training requirements (approximately 2,800-3,200 calories)
Includes specific foods and portions that are realistic and practical for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading, focusing on whether the meal plan balances macronutrients appropriately for endurance sports

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain and strength performance with optimal recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan is structured for 1 day with clear meal timing around workout window
Provides adequate protein distribution (minimum 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight) across meals to support muscle recovery
Includes pre-workout and post-workout nutrition strategically timed for performance and recovery
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for quick reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-based athlete (weightlifter) with specific protein requirements and meal timing around workout windows, verifying the plan supports muscle recovery and performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals and includes snacks appropriate for endurance athletes
All meals and snacks are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Adequate protein intake from plant-based sources to support muscle recovery
Includes carbohydrates and healthy fats suitable for marathon training energy needs
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegetarian/vegan) to ensure the meal plan remains nutritionally complete and sport-appropriate while accommodating ethical or health-based food choices
